title: Item
description: An inventory item in Microsoft Dynamics 365, representing a product or service that can be bought or sold.

id.description: The unique identifier of the item.

displayName.description: The display name of the item.

itemCategoryCode.description: The category code for the item.

blocked.description: Indicates whether the item is blocked.

unitPrice.description: The unit sales price of the item.

unitCost.description: The unit cost of the item.

taxGroupCode.description: The tax group code for the item.

baseUnitOfMeasureCode.description: The base unit of measure code.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the record was last modified.
